name: frida-ios-dump
summary: frida-ios-dump is a tool to dump decrypted iOS apps from a jailbroken or pwn device. Uses Frida's memory APIs to dump the running process to a fresh IPA. Pairs with bagbak and objection.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
